scenarios.opening_query: My husband's criminal case has consumed two years of our lives and we need better help.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Lesser Felony || Criminal Law > Post Conviction/Appeals
scenarios.hidden_fact: He was convicted at trial in the spring — sentencing is done, and the notice of appeal deadline is in twelve days.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: He was convicted in the spring and sentenced — the appeal notice deadline is twelve days out.
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: Trial hasn't happened — it's been continued four times and we want new trial counsel.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: Still no trial — continued four times, and we want new counsel before it happens.

scenarios.opening_query: I did something stupid twenty years ago and it's still following me everywhere I go.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Expunction || Criminal Law > Gun Rights
scenarios.hidden_fact: What actually brought me in: I was denied a hunting rifle purchase last month on the background check — restoring firearm rights is the specific fix I need.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: What triggered this: I failed the background check buying a hunting rifle. It's my firearm rights I need restored.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: which present-day consequence the user needs fixed
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It cost me an apartment application last month — I need the conviction itself sealed from background checks.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: It cost me an apartment last month — I need the record sealed from background checks.
scenarios.vetting_note: Same old record; the triggering consequence selects the remedy.

scenarios.opening_query: The county is trying to take the cash they found in my car and I wasn't even convicted of anything.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Forfeiture || Criminal Law > Misdemeanor
scenarios.hidden_fact: It's not over — they refiled the possession charge last week, so I'm fighting the criminal case and the forfeiture at once, and the criminal case comes first.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: They refiled the possession charge last week — so it's the criminal case first, forfeiture second.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether charges are pending alongside the forfeiture
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: All charges were dismissed months ago — only the civil forfeiture of the $7,400 is still alive.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: Charges were dismissed months ago — only the forfeiture of my $7,400 is left.

scenarios.opening_query: My daughter is in jail on charges from her abusive boyfriend's mess and we don't know the first thing to do.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Lesser Felony || Criminal Law > Juvenile Offender
scenarios.hidden_fact: She's 16 — she's in juvenile detention, and the DA is deciding whether to try to waive her into adult court next week.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: She's 16 and in juvenile detention — the DA decides next week whether to push her into adult court.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: the accused's age and whether adult waiver is threatened
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: She's 22 — county jail, charged as an accomplice on the felony counts from what he did.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: She's 22 — county jail, charged as an accomplice on his felony counts.

scenarios.opening_query: I served my sentence and now the state wants to keep punishing me in a new way.
scenarios.final: Criminal Law > Relief From Sex Offender Registration
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Post Conviction/Appeals || Criminal Law > Relief From Sex Offender Registration
scenarios.hidden_fact: The 'new way' is lifetime registration — I finished everything ten years ago, have a spotless record, and want relief from the registration requirement.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: It's the lifetime registration — I finished everything ten years ago with a spotless record and want relief from registering.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether registration relief is the specific remedy
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: They reinterpreted my old sentence to add supervision time — I need the sentence itself challenged.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: They reinterpreted my sentence to add supervision — I need the sentence itself challenged.
scenarios.vetting_note: Registration relief vs sentence challenge; both 'keep punishing me.'

scenarios.opening_query: My brother's parole officer is setting him up to fail and it's working.
scenarios.final: General Litigation > Civil Matters for Inmates
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Parole/Probation || General Litigation > Civil Matters for Inmates
scenarios.hidden_fact: He's back inside on the violation already — the fight now is the prison denying his heart medication for six weeks, which is a civil-rights case.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: He's back inside on the violation — and now the prison's denied his heart meds for six weeks. That's the fight.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the live issue is revocation defense or conditions of confinement
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: The revocation hearing is next week — that's the fight, and he needs representation at it.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: The revocation hearing is next week — that's what he needs representation for.
